project.name: MC Library
project.description: A small library of useful functions

mclib.object.name: mclib.object
mclib.object.description: Class or Namespace containing object related functions

mclib.Event.name: mclib.Event
mclib.Event.description: Simple generic events class.  Create an event using this class.

mclib.pouch.name: mclib.pouch
mclib.pouch.description:
Class or Namespace that handles pouches.  Pouches are small destroyable objects that can easily be 
passed between method calls and then destroyed once used.

mclib.ProcessList.name: mclib.ProcessList
mclib.ProcessList.description: Creates a list of processes that will be executed asynchronously but in order.

params.name: timeout
params.description: Amount of time between processing.

mclib.hooker[setkey].mclib.hooker.name: mclib.hooker[setkey].mclib.hooker
mclib.hooker[setkey].mclib.hooker.description:
Class or Namespace that handles hooks.  Hooks are like plugins.  They are an architecture that allows predescribed external pieces of   
code to be executed from your code.  In other words, you need to document the hooks in order for them to be used.   This is extremely useful
if you using something like ExtJS and have a form where you want to allow a external developer using your application to create buttons 
and process button clicks from the form. 

Hooks in their most basic form look like:
- namespace
  - init() returns true or false
  - section - there can be more than one section
    - execute() that returns a value - there can be more than one execute function.

mclib.inject.name: mclib.inject
mclib.inject.description: Class or Namespace containing injection related functions

mclib.inject.Scripts.name: mclib.inject.Scripts
mclib.inject.Scripts.description: Inject a list of script tags into the document header waiting for each to load in order.

mclib.inject.Styles.name: mclib.inject.Styles
mclib.inject.Styles.description: Inject a list of style link tags into the document header in order.

classitems.description: Run a procedure for every member in an object.
classitems.name: forEach

params.name: obj
params.description: The object to traverse

params.name: procedure
params.description: Function to run for each member passing (value, member)

classitems.description: Run a procedure for every member in an object.  Don't invoke for functions.
classitems.name: forEachWithoutFunctions

params.name: obj
params.description: The object to traverse

params.name: procedure
params.description: Function to run for each member passing (value, member)

classitems.description: Run a procedure for every item in an array.
classitems.name: forArray

params.name: list
params.description: The array to traverse

params.name: procedure
params.description: Function to run for each item passing (value, index)

classitems.description:
Merge an object into an existing object without overwriting anything
in the original object.
classitems.name: merge

params.name: objdest
params.description:
The destination object for the merge.  If null, 
    undefined  or empty this operation will be treated as a shallow clone.

params.name: objsrc
params.description:
The source object for the merge.  If null or undefined
    this operation will copy this object namespace into the destination object.

classitems.description:
Merge an object into an existing object overwriting existing properties
and methods in the original object.
classitems.name: forceMerge

params.name: objdest
params.description:
The destination object for the merge.  If null, 
    undefined  or empty this operation will be treated as a shallow clone.

params.name: objsrc
params.description:
The source object for the merge.  If null or undefined
    this operation will copy this object namespace into the destination object.

classitems.description:
Clones an object which is the equivalent of a deep copy.  Nested objects
and arrays are cloned so references are different.
classitems.name: clone

params.name: obj
params.description: The object to be cloned.

classitems.description:
Clones an array which is the equivalent of a deep copy.  Nested objects
and arrays are cloned so references are different.
classitems.name: cloneArray

params.name: list
params.description: The array to be cloned.

classitems.description: Returns an array of the name of members in an item.
classitems.name: getMemberList

params.name: obj
params.description: The object whose memberss interest you.

classitems.description: Returns an array of the name of properties from an object.
classitems.name: getMemberListWithoutFunctions

params.name: obj
params.description: The object whose properties interest you.

classitems.description: Returns an array of the values from an object.
classitems.name: getValueListWithoutFunctions

params.name: obj
params.description: The object whose properties interest you.

classitems.description: Returns an array of the membernames/values from an object.
classitems.name: getMemberValueListWithoutFunctions

params.name: obj
params.description: The object whose properties interest you.

classitems.description: Performs a shallow compare of two objects to determine their equality.
classitems.name: compare

params.name: objA
params.description: An object to be compared.

params.name: objB
params.description: An object to be compared.

classitems.description: Performs a shallow compare of two arrays to determine their equality.
classitems.name: compareList

params.name: listA
params.description: A list to be compared.

params.name: listB
params.description: A list to be compared.

classitems.description: Performs a condition function against each item in a list and return an array of matches.
classitems.name: matchingFromList

params.name: list
params.description: A list to traverse.

params.name: condition
params.description: A function to perform against each (value, index).

classitems.description: Performs a condition function against each member of an object and return an object of matches.
classitems.name: filterClass

params.name: obj
params.description: An object to traverse.

params.name: condition
params.description: A function to perform against each (value, member).

classitems.description: Add event handler to listen for an event.
classitems.name: addHandler

params.name: handler
params.description: A function that will be called when event is triggered.

classitems.description: Remove existing event handler.
classitems.name: removeHandler

params.name: handler
params.description: A function that will be called when event is triggered.

classitems.description: Run all listening event handlers immediately.
classitems.name: trigger

params.name: argsObj
params.description:
An object that contains the parameters that will be passed 
                        to the handlers.

classitems.description: Run all listening event handlers asynchronously.
classitems.name: triggerAsync

params.name: argsObj
params.description:
An object that contains the parameters that will be passed 
                        to the handlers.

classitems.description: Get a pouch.
classitems.name: get

params.name: prefix
params.description: An optional prefix for the pouch. Used for id.

classitems.description: Unique id of pouch.
classitems.name: id

classitems.description: Full Name of pouch.  Useful if accessing via HTML.
classitems.name: fullName
example: var html = "Blog";

classitems.description: Indicates if the pouch is in the process of being destroyed.
classitems.name: destroying

classitems.description: Event that is triggered before pouch is actually destroyed.
classitems.name: beforeDestroy

classitems.description: Destroy a pouch.
classitems.name: destroy

params.name: verbs
params.description:
An object containing verb to perform and a comma seperated list
                      of members to perform them on.

classitems.description: Execute the next process in the list.
classitems.name: _execute

classitems.description: Event that is triggered when the ProcessList has emptied.
classitems.name: listEmpty

classitems.description: Event that is triggered at the end of each execution.
classitems.name: progress

classitems.description: Event that is triggered when a process is invalid.
classitems.name: invalid

classitems.description: Add a process to the process list.
classitems.name: add

params.name: process
params.description: A function that will be called asynchronously.

params.name: argsObj
params.description: An object containing the parameters that will be passed that function.

classitems.description: Register a hook to the hooker.
classitems.name: register

params.name: setkey
params.description: The key indicating the set of hooks we are referencing (there can be more than one set).

params.name: hook
params.description: A reference to the hook itself.

classitems.description: Unregister a hook from the hooker.
classitems.name: unregister

params.name: setkey
params.description: The key indicating the set of hooks we are referencing (there can be more than one set).

params.name: hook
params.description: A reference to the hook itself.

classitems.description: Register a namespace containing hooks to the hooker.
classitems.name: registerNamespace

params.name: setkey
params.description: The key indicating the set of hooks we are referencing (there can be more than one set).

params.name: hook
params.description: A reference to the hook itself.

example:
var hooks = mclib.hooker.create("hookskeyname",{preregister: false });
    
    var countregistered = mclib.hooker.registerNamespace("hookskeyname",external);

classitems.description: Execute a set of hooks then returns an array of non-empty results.
classitems.name: execute

params.name: setkey
params.description: The key indicating the set of hooks we are referencing (there can be more than one set).

params.name: sectionname
params.description: The name of the section where the hook function is located.

params.name: parameters
params.description: Optional object containing caller defined parameters for the hook function. Defaults to empty object.

params.name: functionname
params.description: Optional string containing the hook function name to call. Defaults to execute.

classitems.description: Create a hook set (there can be more than one). It will create a namespace based on the setkey.
classitems.name: create

params.name: setkey
params.description: The unique key indicating the set of hooks we are referencing (there can be more than one set).

params.name: initconfig
params.description:
Optional object containing caller defined initialisation parameters for the hook. Defaults to empty object. 
                
                Passing a config parameter named "preregister" will allow you to turn off on the fly registration
                for the hook maker.  If preregister = true, you will define a namespace the user can place their hooks then register that 
                namespace onload.  If preregister = false, special functions will be supplied that allow the user to register their hook
                at any time they like.

classitems.description: Initial config passed to create.
classitems.name: config

classitems.description: Array of hooks considered active.
classitems.name: activehooks

classitems.description: Register a hook to the hooker.  Only available if set was created with preregister=false.
classitems.name: register

params.name: hook
params.description: A reference to the hook itself.

classitems.description: Unregister a hook to the hooker.  Only available if set was created with preregister=false.
classitems.name: unregister

params.name: hook
params.description: A reference to the hook itself.

classitems.description: Event that is triggered when injection is complete.
classitems.name: injectEnd

classitems.description: Add script to the list of scripts that will be injected.
classitems.name: add

params.name: name
params.description: An arbitrary keyname to identify the script tag.

params.name: url
params.description: The url of the script file.

params.name: condition
params.description: A boolean function that indicates if script is already loaded.

classitems.description: Inject each script in the list in order, waiting for each to be loaded.
classitems.name: inject
example: injection.inject()

classitems.description: Event that is triggered when injection is complete.
classitems.name: injectEnd

classitems.description: Add style link to the list of style links that will be injected.
classitems.name: add

params.name: name
params.description: An arbitrary keyname to identify the style link tag.

params.name: url
params.description: The url of the style file.

example:
var injection = new mclib.inject.Styles();
    injection.add("somestyle", "http://www.mydomain.com/mystyle.css");

classitems.description: Inject each style link in the list in order.
classitems.name: inject
example: injection.inject()
